arts.ttl: Man United 'make Marcus Rashford loan decision' amid Arsenal, Chelsea speculation
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly willing to let Marcus Rashford leave on loan in January but will not sanction a move to a Premier League club.

arts.ttl: “I can guarantee” – Fabrizio Romano drops Arsenal update ahead of January window
arts.sum: Arsenal have been struggling this season and they have not been their usual self. The Gunners are currently third in the Premier League but they have been far from their best this season. Out of the 16 Premier League matches they have played this season, they have only managed to win eight of them. arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal face Crystal Palace for the second time in a week when the Gunners travel to Selhurst Park on Saturday evening. Mikel Arteta’s team edged out the Eagles 3-2 in an entertaining Carabao Cup tie in midweek to secure their spot in the semi-finals. Attention now turns back to the Premier League title race and […] The post Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: We simulated Crystal Palace vs Arsenal to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Jesus, Trossard. After going head-to-head in the Carabao Cup midweek, Arsenal and Crystal Palace meet once again in the Premier League later today.

arts.ttl: 'Saka doesn't like': Oliver Glasner thinks he knows how to stop Arsenal's starboy vs Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: I played for Arsenal and my last club completed transfer without telling me
arts.sum: Days later, the player reposted - adding a smiling face with a tear emoji - the following message from content creator and fellow non-league footballer Alex Teniola: "I'm done with these stupid clubs that think they can do what they want! Tottenham-born former Arsenal youth player Jason Banton claims to have learned about becoming a free agent on social media.

arts.ttl: £62m Victor Osimhen deal, Alexander Isak move - Arsenal striker transfer decision made - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: The Gunners have been linked with plenty of different players in the past few transfer windows, with the likes of Viktor Gyokeres, Alexander Isak and Benjamin Sesko chief among them. We asked our football.london writers to name the preferred choice out of six names put to them - Sesko, Gyokeres, Isak, Jonathan David, Victor Osimhen and Dusan Vlahovic.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal have now decided they will try and sign £54m striker if Benjamin Sesko snubs them again
